ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON blob containing the hyperparameters used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Square Error (MSE) */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) */,
  "wae" REAL /* Weighted Absolute Error (WAE) */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "evaluation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluating the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each run of the model evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
